summary: Factual error in #eg-falsifiability eclipse pre-commitment paragraph: August 12, 2026 eclipse described as 'annular' but it is total (NASA Besselian magnitude 1.0386). Section 2.7 (line 2949 of docs/index.html) already correctly states 'total, not annular' with magnitude. Annular eclipse of 2026 was February 17 (Antarctic). Falsifiability module's fm-jump anchor lands readers directly on this paragraph. EXP-277 P1 fixes via 'annular solar eclipse' → 'total solar eclipse' string replace. P3 adds regression-guard tests. Duplicate of EXP-256 c2 H3 / part of ISS-1696 / part of ISS-1695. Recommend patch via EXP-277 then close.
